session.user:
Run the following command and report all results. Do NOT fix any errors - just report:
uv run pytest tests/unit/cli/commands/codespace/test_connect_cmd.py -v
Report the full output including pass/fail status for each test.
session.assistant: I'll run the pytest command and report all results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on connect_cmd tests with verbose output
